title: Available Payment Instrument
description: An instrument type a handler accepts, with a Constraint describing what an acceptable instrument of this type must satisfy.

type.description: The instrument type identifier (e.g., 'card'). References an instrument schema's type constant.

credentials.description: Accepted credential families and their per-family constraints, each a Typed Constraint keyed by `type`. The consumer applies the entry matching the submitted credential; unknown types are handler/extension branches. This is a data list, not a schema `oneOf`.

constraints.description: Constraint on an acceptable instrument. `required`/`properties`/`enum` describe presence and allowed values of the instrument's own fields (e.g. `billing_address`, `brand`); `credentials` extends it with per-credential-type constraints. Open to instrument-specific keys.
